response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of senior IC engineering experience with relevant exposure to developer tooling (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup at Altom, Selenium course design) and a teaching/mentoring track record, but the resume shows no explicit people-management or line-manager experience, which is the core requirement of this Level II SEM role. Mobile platform exposure is light (iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016) and there is no evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap. Worth a screening call to probe hidden tech-lead/manager scope, but on paper the people-leadership gap is significant.
strengths: Deep, long-tenured engineering background (Stripe, Shopify, Sociomantic) easily exceeding the 8-year bar
Demonstrable developer-tooling and test-infrastructure work (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/dev-ops at Altom, MCP code generators at Stripe)
Strong knowledge-sharing record (workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos) suggesting mentoring capability
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report experience listed — fails the 2-year management minimum
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth relative to the role's focus
Overlapping 'Founder, Datadog' entry (2016-present) alongside full-time roles raises clarity/credibility questions to resolve

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
